name: clawr-compiler
description: Prototype compiler for the Clawr language

scripts.check:no-explicit-any: if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then rg -n --pcre2 ":\\s*any\\b" src tests; else grep -RInE ":[[:space:]]*any\\b" src tests; fi && (echo "Found explicit any annotations" && exit 1) || exit 0
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun build src/rwrc/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/rwrc
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run check:no-explicit-any && bun test tests/unit
scripts.test:all: bun run build && npm run check:no-explicit-any && bun test tests/unit && bun test tests/e2e
